Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import sharp from 'sharp'; import {readdirSync,statSync} from 'fs'; for \(const f of readdirSync\('public/img'\)\) { if\(!/\\.\(webp|png|jpe?g\)$/i.test\(f\)\) continue; try { const m = await sharp\('public/img/'+f\).metadata\(\); console.log\(f, m.width+'x'+m.height, Math.round\(statSync\('public/img/'+f\).size/1024\)+'KB'\); } catch\(e\){ console.log\(f,'ERR'\); } }")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import sharp from 'sharp'; import {readdirSync,statSync} from 'fs'; for \(const f of readdirSync\('public/img/heroes'\)\) { if\(!/\\.\(webp|png|jpe?g\)$/i.test\(f\)\) continue; try { const m = await sharp\('public/img/heroes/'+f\).metadata\(\); console.log\(f, m.width+'x'+m.height, Math.round\(statSync\('public/img/heroes/'+f\).size/1024\)+'KB'\); } catch\(e\){ console.log\(f,'ERR'\); } }")
